name: Memphis Pork Supper
recipeIngredient: 4 medium Tart red apples, cored and cut into rings
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and quarter the sweet potatoes.
2. Trim all fat from the pork; brown small pieces at a time in a little of the trimmings in a large skillet. Remove with a slotted spoon and set aside.
3. Arrange the potatoes around the edge of the slow cooker. Place half of the meat in the middle. Top each layer with half of the onion slices and apple rings; sprinkle with half the brown sugar. Repeat to make a second layer of meat and onions, overlapping the remaining apple rings around the edge. Sprinkle the remaining brown sugar over.
4. Combine the apple juice, salt, marjoram, and pepper in a 2-cup measure. Pour over the apple rings and cover.
5. Cook on low for 8 hours or on high for 4 hours, or until the pork is tender. Sprinkle with chopped parsley before serving.
